# robots.txt for 太初命理
# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html

User-agent: *

# 允许访问的公开页面
Allow: /
Allow: /bazi
Allow: /tarot
Allow: /liuyao
Allow: /hehun
Allow: /daily
Allow: /help
Allow: /recharge
Allow: /legal/agreement
Allow: /legal/privacy

# ==========================================
# 禁止访问后台及用户私密页面
# ==========================================
# 管理后台（所有变体）
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*

# 用户私密页面
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /profile/*

# 所有 API 接口
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

# 认证相关
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /logout
Disallow: /register

# 错误页
Disallow: /404
Disallow: /403
Disallow: /500

# 特定功能页（分享链接禁止索引）
Disallow: /tarot/share/

# ==========================================
# 禁止访问特定文件类型
# ==========================================
Disallow: /*.pdf$
Disallow: /*.doc$
Disallow: /*.docx$
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.xml$
Disallow: /*.log$
Disallow: /*.env$
Disallow: /*.config$
Disallow: /.git/
Disallow: /.env
Disallow: /vendor/
Disallow: /node_modules/

# 抓取频率
Crawl-delay: 1

# 站点地图
Sitemap: https://taichu.chat/sitemap.xml

# ==========================================
# 主流搜索引擎专用配置
# ==========================================

# 百度爬虫
User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profile/
Crawl-delay: 1

# 搜狗爬虫
User-agent: Sogou spider
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profile/
Crawl-delay: 1

# 360爬虫
User-agent: 360Spider
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profile/
Crawl-delay: 1

# Google
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profile/
Crawl-delay: 1

# Bing
User-agent: bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profile/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ==========================================
# 禁止已知恶意/付费爬虫（隐私保护）
# ==========================================
User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow: /
